summary: Full e2e test of ZebraLab MVP: 12/12 backend pytest tests passed; all major frontend flows verified (editor, templates, preview, batch CSV, export). No blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider FastAPI lifespan handlers. Non-blocking.
zpl_preview makes a synchronous requests.post inside an async endpoint -- will block the event loop under load. Acceptable for single-user MVP but consider httpx.AsyncClient for production.
seed_data_creation: Created+deleted templates with TEST_ prefix; cleanup performed in fixtures and via API after UI test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_zebralab_api.py covers root, ZPL gen (with precio special-case $ prefix), export .prn, Labelary PNG preview, full Templates CRUD + duplicate, batch CSV parse + generate with X-Total-Labels header. Frontend uses ToolsPanel testids: tool-text-0, tool-text-var, tool-barcode-2 (Code128), tool-barcode-3 (EAN13), tool-barcode-4 (QR), tool-rectangle-5, tool-line-6. Batch file input is hidden -- use state='attached' with set_input_files. Labelary may rate-limit; preview returns 502 in that case (test_zpl_preview_returns_png handles via pytest.skip).
